violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2024

There was no evidence that employees are required to report to the person in charge information about their health (illnesses, symptoms) as they relate to diseases that are transmissible through food. New Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2025

The soap dispensers were observed empty located in the kitchen and self-service area at hand-washing sink. PIC refilled soap dispensers at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with grayish/black residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Per employee ice machine are cleaned bi-weekly on Fridays. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2025

Observe container with various breads/bagels and cream cheese/butter located in self-service area lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2025

The outside dumpster observed not closed. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered/closed to prevent pest. New Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2024

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. PIC instructed to take dish machine out of service and only use three bay sink until unit can be serviced and tested. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2024

The floor and wall junctures in the ware-washing area do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2024

Protective shielding is not provided for the lights in the back kitchen/ware-washing area. Light bulbs must be shielded, coated, or otherwise shatter-resistant in areas where there is exposed food; clean equipment, utensils, and linens; or unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2024
The Person in charge did not assure compliance with critical code requirements. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2024

There was no evidence that employees are required to report to the person in charge information about their health (illnesses, symptoms) as they relate to diseases that are transmissible through food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2024
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2024

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Dishwashing machine could not be fixed at time of inspection. Dishwashing machine was taken out of service and staff instructed to use three compartment sink instead. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2024
Several boxes of food were observed stored on the floor in the storage room. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the three bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2024
The ceiling in certain areas of the kitchen area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2024

The floor and wall junctures in the warewashing area do not have coving (large gap observed in floor to wall juncture under three bay sink). The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2024

The floor under the three bay sink around the grease trap has an accumulation of spilled pooling grease. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2024

Protective shielding is not provided for the lights in the kitchen and ware-washing areas. Light bulbs must be shielded, coated, or otherwise shatter-resistant in areas where there is exposed food; clean equipment, utensils, and linens; or unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2024

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored in the kitchen area. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2024
